debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Pop.ArchReq
arr : Pop.RequestArray inst✝
req : Pop.Request inst✝
⊢ Pop.valConsistent✝ inst✝ (Pop.RequestArray._insert✝ inst✝ arr req) = true

failed_attempts:
unfold RequestArray._insert
  simp only []
  split
  · exact RequestArrayInsertConsistent_uset arr req ‹_›
  · split
    · rename_i h1 h2
      have hle : req.id.toNat.toUSize.toNat ≤ (growArray arr.val (req.id.toNat + 1)).size := by
        rw [Nat.beq_eq] at h2; omega
      exact RequestArrayInsertConsistent_insertIdx arr req h1 h2 hle
    · -- unreachable case
      unfold panicWithPosWithDecl
      simp [panic, panicCore]
      show valConsistent (#[] : Array (Option (Request))) = true
      rfl
